headline: Tesla Stock (TSLA) Revs Up as Regulators Take No Action Over “Actually Smart Summon” Crashes
summary: Tesla (TSLA) stock revved higher in pre-market trading today after safety regulators closed an investigation into its Actually Smart Summon vehicle feature. No Action Needed The U.S. National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) said today that it had closed its over-a-year-long investigation into the EV giant’s feature that allows users to remotely move vehicles over short distances in parking areas using a smartphone app while maintaining continuous supervision. headline: Broadcom expands Google, Anthropic deals; Intel joins Musk's Terafab
summary: Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman takes a look at some of Tuesday morning's trending tickers and stories.Shares of health insurers, including UnitedHealth (UNH), Humana (HUM), and CVS (CVS), are soaring on news that the government will increase private insurer reimbursements by 2.48%.Broadcom (AVGO) is expanding its deals with Google (GOOG, GOOGL) and Anthropic (ANTH.PVT).Intel (INTC) is set to join Elon Musk's Terafab artificial intelligence (AI) chip project with Tesla (TSLA), SpaceX, and xAI.

content.title: Broadcom expands Google, Anthropic deals; Intel joins Musk's Terafab
content.description:
Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman takes a look at some of Tuesday morning's trending tickers and stories.

Shares of health insurers, including UnitedHealth (UNH), Humana (HUM), and CVS (CVS), are soaring on news that the government will increase private insurer reimbursements by 2.48%.

Broadcom (AVGO) is expanding its deals with Google (GOOG, GOOGL) and Anthropic (ANTH.PVT).

Intel (INTC) is set to join Elon Musk's Terafab artificial intelligence (AI) chip project with Tesla (TSLA), SpaceX, and xAI.
content.summary: Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman takes a look at some of Tuesday morning's trending tickers and stories.Shares of health insurers, including UnitedHealth (UNH), Humana (HUM), and CVS (CVS), are soaring on news that the government will increase private insurer reimbursements by 2.48%.Broadcom (AVGO) is expanding its deals with Google (GOOG, GOOGL) and Anthropic (ANTH.PVT).Intel (INTC) is set to join Elon Musk's Terafab artificial intelligence (AI) chip project with Tesla (TSLA), SpaceX, and xAI.

headline: Intel joins Musk's Terafab AI chip project to power humanoid, data center goals
summary: Intel said on Tuesday it will partner with Elon Musk's Terafab AI chip complex project alongside SpaceX and Tesla to ‌help produce processors powering the tech billionaire's robotics and data center ambitions.  Intel's ‌shares jumped nearly 3% after the news, with the company also saying it hosted Musk at ​its campus the past weekend.  The announcement comes months after Musk laid out plans for Tesla to build a massive artificial-intelligence chip fab to power the EV-maker's autonomous ambitions and suggested the company could work with Intel.

content.title: Intel joins Musk's Terafab AI chip project to power humanoid, data center goals
content.summary: Intel said on Tuesday it will partner with Elon Musk's Terafab AI chip complex project alongside SpaceX and Tesla to ‌help produce processors powering the tech billionaire's robotics and data center ambitions.  Intel's ‌shares jumped nearly 3% after the news, with the company also saying it hosted Musk at ​its campus the past weekend.  The announcement comes months after Musk laid out plans for Tesla to build a massive artificial-intelligence chip fab to power the EV-maker's autonomous ambitions and suggested the company could work with Intel.

headline: Used Cars Are Expensive, Again. Time to Consider a Used Tesla.
summary: Shoppers might want to consider a used electric vehicle at least to lessen the pain at the pump.  On Tuesday, Cox Automotive released the latest Manheim Used Vehicle Value Index, a common measure of used car pricing.  “All major vehicle segments are above year-earlier levels; however, the luxury segment continues to outperform the overall market,” said Jeremy Robb, Cox Automotive’s chief economist, in a news release.

content.title: Used Cars Are Expensive, Again. Time to Consider a Used Tesla.

headline: Intel to Help SpaceX, Tesla Make Chips. Its Stock Is Up.
summary: SpaceX and  Tesla  are tapping Intel to help the pair realize their AI dreams.  “Terafab” is Elon Musk’s plan to vertically integrate into semiconductor production, which he believes will be a key bottleneck for AI in the coming years.  The fab is a joint effort between Musk’s xAI, SpaceX, and Tesla, which he calls “the most epic chip building exercise in history.”

content.title: Intel to Help SpaceX, Tesla Make Chips. Its Stock Is Up.

The fab is a joint effort between Musk’s xAI, SpaceX, and Tesla, which he calls “the most epic chip building exercise in history.”

headline: Intel Stock Jumps Following Elon Musk Chip Deal. Why the Turnaround Is Gaining Steam.
summary: SpaceX and Tesla are tapping Intel to help the pair realize their AI dreams.  “Terafab” is Elon Musk’s plan to vertically integrate into semiconductor production, which he believes will be a key bottleneck for AI in the coming years.  The fab is a joint effort between Musk’s xAI, SpaceX, and Tesla, which he calls “the most epic chip building exercise in history.”
